privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified and accurate. The task involves five Docker containers (acme-web, acme-api, acme-worker, acme-scheduler, acme-notifier) with intentionally misconfigured logging. The critical error code ERR-4721 (payment gateway timeout) is hardcoded into the setup and appears in at least two container startup sequences. The standard logging configuration target is json-file driver with max-size=10m and max-file=3. The report must be written to /home/ga/Desktop/log_audit_report.txt. Passing score requires 60 points from the verifier, which checks for: correct fixed container configuration (60 pts), original containers stopped (10 pts), and audit report with error code and substantial content (30 pts). All data is synthetically generated by setup scripts, not from external sources.
